leak:libpaddle_inference
# TensorFlow 2.20
leak:xla::
leak:mlir::
leak:llvm::
# Upstream issue: LeakSanitizer itself SEGVs while unwinding inside TF/MLIR/XLA
# (ThreadRegistry::GetThreadLocked in sanitizer_thread_registry.h). Treat as CI flake.
# This suppression matches the crashing stack rather than a real leak.
# Note: lsan suppressions are matched as substrings on the stack trace.
ThreadRegistry::GetThreadLocked
